summary: Iteration 36 - Cafeteria & Employee Dining Module Tests PASSED. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Cafeteria panel opens from sidebar with 7 tabs (Overview, Locations, Meal Periods, Cycle Menus, Transactions, Waste Tracker, KPI Engine). Overview shows 5 operating mode cards with objectives and metrics. All CRUD operations working. Property Picker still visible in sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: Cafeteria module fully implemented with all 7 tabs working correctly
KB domain 'cafeteria_dining' properly seeded with 5 operating modes
All endpoints return proper data structures with mode-specific KPIs
Frontend tabs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Location creation validates mode_id against KB and returns 400 for invalid modes
KPI Engine computes participation_rate, subsidy_rate, waste_per_meal correctly
Waste summary groups by reason type with percentage breakdown
Transaction summary supports location_id filter and payment method breakdown
Property Picker still visible and functional in sidebar (8 options)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed location (Resort Staff Dining Room) + TEST_ prefixed data created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 verified Cafeteria & Employee Dining module. Backend: GET /api/cafeteria/overview (kb_loaded=true, 5 modes), CRUD /api/cafeteria/locations (validates mode_id), CRUD /api/cafeteria/meal-periods, CRUD /api/cafeteria/menus, POST /api/cafeteria/transactions + GET /api/cafeteria/transactions/summary, POST /api/cafeteria/waste + GET /api/cafeteria/waste/summary, GET /api/cafeteria/kpis/{location_id}. Frontend: Cafeteria panel has 7 tabs with data-testid: caf-tab-overview, caf-tab-locations, caf-tab-meal-periods, caf-tab-menus, caf-tab-transactions, caf-tab-waste, caf-tab-kpis. Property Picker still visible in sidebar. Cross-property dashboard still working.

locations.create_valid_mode: PASS - creates with mode_name and kpis
locations.verify_persistence: PASS - created location appears in list

menus.create_with_items: PASS - creates menu with items array

transactions.record_transaction: PASS - creates with tx_id and date

kpis.mode_specific_data: PASS - returns participation_rate, subsidy_rate, mode_objectives, mode_metrics

frontend_tests.seven_tabs_present: PASS - All 7 tabs with correct data-testid
frontend_tests.overview_tab: PASS - Shows 5 mode cards with objectives and metrics
frontend_tests.locations_tab: PASS - Shows 2 location cards with mode badges, Add Location button
frontend_tests.meal_periods_tab: PASS - Shows periods with subsidy info, Add Period button
frontend_tests.menus_tab: PASS - Shows menus with items, Add Menu button
frontend_tests.transactions_tab: PASS - Shows summary KPIs and payment breakdown, Record Transaction button
frontend_tests.waste_tab: PASS - Shows waste totals and by_reason bars, Log Waste button
frontend_tests.kpis_tab: PASS - Shows location selector and mode-specific KPIs
frontend_tests.property_picker: PASS - Visible in sidebar with 8 options

mocked_apis.note: All Cafeteria endpoints fully implemented with MongoDB persistence
